---
title: "Advanced Topics in Statistical Data Science"
listing:
  type: default
  sort: date desc
  categories: true 
  contents: .
  page-size: 10
---

<div id="random-article-sidebar-wrapper" style="display: none; margin-top: 1.25rem;">
  <button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-primary rounded-pill w-100" id="random-article-btn">Show Random Article</button>
</div>

<div style="margin-bottom: 20px;"></div>
